special_offers.title: Full Body Color Change Savings
special_offers.description: Save on qualifying full body color change packages priced $1200 or more.
special_offers.terms: Valid on qualifying full body color change packages with a pre-discount price of $1200 or more. One promo code per vehicle. Cannot be combined with other offers.

special_offers.title: 15% Off Custom Racing Stripes
special_offers.description: Take 15% off custom racing stripes packages for coupes booked online.
special_offers.terms: Online bookings only. Discount applies to labor for racing stripes packages on eligible coupes. Not valid on previously completed work.

special_offers.title: New Year Repaint Event 2025
special_offers.description: Expired offer for archival reference: discounts on full-body repaints at the start of 2025.
special_offers.terms: Promotion ended February 15, 2025. No longer valid.

special_offers.title: Spring Ceramic Clear Coat Upgrade
special_offers.description: Scheduled promo: special pricing on ceramic clear coat repaints and color changes.
special_offers.terms: Valid only during the promotional window on select ceramic clear coat packages. Requires annual inspection to maintain warranty benefits.

special_offers.title: Wheel & Touch-Up Bundle Bonus
special_offers.description: Get a bonus discount when booking wheel refinishing with spot repair.
special_offers.terms: Both wheel paint and spot repair services must be booked on the same vehicle and invoice. Discount applies to the lower-priced service line.
